title: Simple RPG
body:
# Simple RPG

Simple RPG is a Modrinth only modpack, focused around fighting and adventuring the world. Since this pack is made with only modrinth mods, it might feel like it's still misses some mods. I hope this will change as more and more mods move to modrinth.

P.S. It might feel a bit unbalanced right now, I have not yet been able to tweak it properly yet
